About Us

About Us

Career Opportunities

Join our team of dedicated individuals. Your actions have the incredible power to inspire change and create a positive impact on the endometriosis community.

About us:

The Endometriosis Network Canada is dedicated to enhancing the lives of individuals living with endometriosis across Canada. As a registered charity in Canada founded in 2012, our measurable impact includes providing support and education to thousands of Canadians, developing dedicated programs for underserved communities, raising awareness, and impacting policy across Canada.

Our values:

To cultivate an inclusive community
To facilitate compassionate support
To enhance and encourage knowledge
To honour the individual journey

Our mission:

To promote awareness, and provide inclusive education, support and resources for people living with and affected by endometriosis.

Current Career Opportunities:

None at this time

 

How to apply:

For individuals interested in pursuing any of the opportunities listed, please submit your resume and cover letter to: info@endometriosisnetwork.ca

In the subject line, please indicate the position you are applying for.

Please note: only candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.

A note for prospective applicants
